headline: Freedom Broker Sees Verizon (VZ) as an Execution-Dependent Telecom Story
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is included among the Top 10 Income Stocks with the Highest Upside Potential. headline: Verizon Weighs AI Security Partnership And New Spectrum In Growth Story
summary: Verizon Communications (NYSE:VZ) has joined Project Glasswing, a cybersecurity AI partnership managed by Anthropic. The company is collaborating to apply frontier AI tools to protect critical communications infrastructure. Verizon has also received FCC clearance for a $1b purchase of spectrum assets from US Cellular. The spectrum acquisition is intended to expand Verizon’s network capacity and support heavier data use. For investors watching NYSE:VZ, these updates come as the stock trades...

headline: Ericsson Private 5G now available for Verizon Business private networks internationally
summary: Ericsson announced today its private wireless networking solution, Ericsson Private 5G, is now available through Verizon Business private wireless deployments beyond U.S. borders. This collaboration enables global enterprises already using Ericsson technology in Verizon Business Private 5G Networks in the U.S. to extend these capabilities to their international campuses, unlocking new opportunities for digital transformation.
